overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked futuristic metropolis. The player navigates neon-drenched streets, crosses intersections with futuristic vehicles, and descends into a dark concrete underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit city sidewalk with digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-slicked sidewalk toward an intersection, passing under glowing neon signs

entered.detail: tall buildings covered with colorful digital advertisements and neon signage
green neon sign reading 'softs' mounted on a distant building
pink-blossomed tree illuminated by streetlights on the sidewalk
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city sidewalk at night, surrounded by towering buildings covered in neon advertisements. A green 'softs' sign glows in the distance while a pink cherry tree stands on the right. The camera moves steadily forward toward a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: stepping onto yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the street
turning right onto sidewalk next to concrete wall with red graffiti

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the yellow zebra crossing, then turning right to walk alongside a concrete wall

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving past the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: gray concrete wall featuring large red spray-painted tiger face graffiti
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a wet intersection marked with yellow stripes as a blue sports car passes by. After crossing, the camera turns right to follow a sidewalk alongside a concrete wall featuring prominent red tiger graffiti, moving toward an overpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: street beneath overpass with large ventilation structures

events.description: waiting at crosswalk for vehicles to pass before crossing
crossing the street while futuristic vehicles drive by

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for traffic to clear, then crossing the street while observing the surroundings

entered.detail: massive circular red metal fan structure mounted on building facade
red neon sign with 'Chang' text visible above the street
red illuminated sign reading 'Cirrus' on the building side

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath an overpass, the scene features a massive red ventilation fan on the right building and red neon signs including 'Chang' and 'Cirrus' on the left. The player waits for traffic to pass before crossing the street, with futuristic cars driving along the wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with dense digital advertising

events.description: entering covered pedestrian walkway with overhead neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through a crowded covered walkway, passing by benches and numerous digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in colorful jacket walking ahead on the walkway

entered.detail: overhead metal structure covering the pedestrian path with hanging light fixtures
large vertical digital screen displaying 'WET DREAM' in pink neon text
bright blue billboard featuring 'Sofia Machistadog' and a hot dog graphic
concrete seating along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway lined with benches and dense neon advertising. A prominent 'WET DREAM' billboard glows on the right while a colorful 'Sofia Machistadog' advertisement covers the left wall. Various pedestrians walk through the space as the camera moves steadily forward.

events.description: turning left and entering dark concrete stairwell leading downward
descending into dimly lit underpass with cyan accent lighting

agents.ego_description: descending a concrete stairwell into a dark underpass, leaving the neon-lit street behind

entered.detail: opening leading to descending concrete stairs with metal railings
rough gray concrete walls enclosing the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions from the bright neon walkway into a dark, narrow concrete stairwell. The camera descends into an underpass with rough gray walls and minimal cyan accent lighting, leaving the bustling city street and its advertisements behind for the shadowy depths below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic city that gradually descends from vibrant, rain-slicked streets into a dark concrete underpass. It begins on a wet sidewalk beneath towering advertisements and a glowing green sign, moving steadily forward past a pink cherry tree toward a crosswalk. As the camera crosses the yellow-striped intersection and a blue sports car flashes by, the path shifts right along a concrete wall marked with red tiger graffiti and leads beneath an overpass flanked by a massive red ventilation fan and glowing corporate signs. The scene then expands into a covered pedestrian walkway crowded with people and saturated by the light of a Wet Dream billboard and colorful advertisements before turning toward a narrow exit. Finally, the camera leaves the bustling neon glow behind, descending a stark concrete stairwell into a shadowy underpass illuminated only by minimal cyan accent lighting.
